Valdo Sun Screen Lotion: A New Era in Skin Protection
• Valdo goes beyond broad-spectrum protection. This innovative
sunscreen with SPF 50+ not only shields your skin from UVA
and UVB rays, but also defends against harmful blue light
thanks to its cutting-edge Canadian blue light-cutting formula.
This multi-defense approach provides ultimate protection
against the damaging effects of the sun.
• Valdo sun screen offers exceptional sun protection, blocking up
to 99% of the sun's rays. This helps minimize the cumulative
health risks associated with long-term sun exposure.

screen is ideal for sensitive and acne-prone skin. It's gentle and
non-irritating.

antioxidants and moisturizing agents that soothe redness and
leave your skin looking radiant and youthful. Plus, it's dry-
touch, oil-free, and water-resistant for a comfortable, long-
lasting wear.

of skin filters for UVA, UVB, Blue ray protection also that contains
antioxidant and moisturizing agents for soothing skin redness.

products.name: Valdo Anti _aging Serum
products.description:
Discover the secret to youthful, radiant skin with Valdo Anti-Aging Serum, a revolutionary product that combines the power of Canadian nanotechnology with a rich formula of 7 essential benefits. This serum is specifically designed to deliver instant radiance, skin tightening, therapeutic skin lightening, antioxidant protection, wrinkle reduction, skin nourishment, and deep skin hydration.
Effective Ingredients for Amazing Results:
Valdo Serum features a unique blend of active ingredients that work synergistically to achieve optimal results:
•	Hyaluronic Acid: For deep hydration and filling fine lines.
•	Niacinamide: To brighten the skin and even out skin tone.
•	Caffeine and Carnitine: To firm skin and improve the appearance of pores and control sebum production.
•	Glycolic Acid, Alpha Arbutin, and Kojic Acid: To lighten dark spots and renew the skin.
•	Vitamin A, Vitamin E, Panthenol, Allantoin, and Glycerin: To renew, nourish and soften the skin.
Indications for Use:
•	Wrinkles and Fine Lines: Visibly reduces their appearance.
•	Dark Spots and Hyperpigmentation: Lightens and evens out skin tone.
•	Early Sun Damage: Protects the skin from harmful effects.
•	Enlarged Pores: Minimizes their size and improves their appearance.
•	Dry Skin: Provides long-lasting deep hydration.
•	Paleness: Provides Instant Glow on spot.
•	Acne: Helps control it and improve skin appearance.
•	Skincare Treatments: Can be used after hydrafacial, oxygen, and radiofrequency treatments.
How to Use:
•	Apply a small amount of serum to damp skin.
•	Massage the skin gently until the serum is fully absorbed.
•	Use a suitable moisturizer afterward.

products.name: Valdo Milk Body Lotion
products.description:
Experience smooth, hydrated, and radiant skin with Valdo Milk Lotion, the rich formula that combines deep hydration, skin brightening, and hair growth delay. This unique lotion deeply nourishes the skin, reduces dryness, itching, and redness, and restores skin elasticity and softness. Additionally, it helps slow down and delay excess hair growth, giving your skin an ultra-smooth texture for longer. With a long-lasting, captivating scent of white musk and vanilla.
Effective Ingredients for Amazing Results:
Valdo Milk Lotion features a unique blend of active ingredients that work synergistically to achieve optimal results:
•	Hyaluronic Acid and Niacinamide: For deep hydration and skin brightening.
•	Shea Butter, Allantoin, and Panthenol: To soften and soothe the skin.
•	Cyperus Rotundus Oil (Sedge Oil): To delay excess hair growth.
•	Urea, Chamomile Extract, and Licorice Root Extract: To soothe inflamed skin and brighten it.
•	Sweet Almond Oil and Lanolin: To nourish and hydrate the skin.
Indications for Use:
•	Dry Skin Hydration and Softening: Provides long-lasting deep hydration.
•	Reducing Signs of Skin Aging: Helps maintain youthful and radiant skin.
•	Post-Laser Skin Soothing: Relieves redness and irritation.
